strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong TDD/craftsmanship background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms era)
No mention of Vitest, Playwright, or recent cloud platform work (AWS CDK noted but no GCP/Azure/Kubernetes depth beyond GISCollective)

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TS/Node/React depth with AI-agent work
Missing Nest.js and limited modern Kotlin/Java

response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node/React experience and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq. Strong engineering discipline (TDD, trunk-based development) and prior fintech/automation domain experience align well with internal tooling. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin are real but learnable for a senior of this caliber, and overall fit is strong.
